issues.title: No onboarding or welcome message
issues.description: A first-time visitor lands on the Dashboard with no explanation of what this is, where the data comes from, or how to use it. The sidebar says 'Chicago Crime' but there is no welcome text.
reproduction_steps: Navigate to Dashboard as a new user
Look for any welcome message or onboarding
issues.expected: A welcome banner or modal explaining the dashboard purpose and data source
issues.actual: No onboarding; page starts with KPI cards immediately

issues.title: Maps show as empty black boxes during loading
issues.description: The ChoroplethMap and ClusterMap components show as black card containers while the map tiles load. A first-time visitor may think the maps are broken.
reproduction_steps: Observe map cards during initial load
issues.expected: Loading skeleton or spinner while map tiles load
issues.actual: Empty black card containers until tiles load

issues.title: No empty state for filtered results
issues.description: When filters return no data, the charts may show empty states but there is no explicit message like 'No crimes match these filters'.
reproduction_steps: Apply very restrictive filters (e.g., one specific type + one day)
issues.expected: Message: 'No crimes match these filters. Try broadening your date range.'
issues.actual: Charts show empty or zero values without explanation

issues.title: No keyboard navigation support
issues.description: A first-time visitor using keyboard navigation cannot tab through the sidebar, charts, or maps. No focus indicators are visible.
reproduction_steps: Press Tab key repeatedly on Dashboard
issues.expected: Visible focus rings on all interactive elements
issues.actual: No visible focus indicators; keyboard navigation unclear

summary: Dashboard shows real data but first-time visitors have no onboarding, maps show empty states during loading, and keyboard navigation is unclear.
